note: Compound v2 cETH (CEther). Value-carrying actions use distinct PAYABLE selectors vs CErc20 (mint()/repayBorrow()/repayBorrowBehalf(address)/liquidateBorrow(address,address)) because the amount comes from msg.value, not calldata. redeem/redeemUnderlying/borrow share CErc20 selectors.

0xdb006a75.name: redeem
0xdb006a75.reason: user position: redeem cToken shares for underlying (Lending::Withdraw, by-shares)

0x852a12e3.name: redeemUnderlying
0x852a12e3.reason: user position: withdraw an exact underlying amount (Lending::Withdraw, by-underlying)

0xc5ebeaec.name: borrow
0xc5ebeaec.reason: user position: borrow underlying against collateral (Lending::Borrow)

0xa9059cbb.name: transfer
0xa9059cbb.reason: standard ERC-20 (cToken is itself an ERC20 receipt) — covered by the erc20 standard adapter via auto-enumerate, not a per-(chain,address) manifest

0x23b872dd.name: transferFrom
0x23b872dd.reason: standard ERC-20 (cToken is itself an ERC20 receipt) — covered by the erc20 standard adapter via auto-enumerate, not a per-(chain,address) manifest

0x095ea7b3.name: approve
0x095ea7b3.reason: standard ERC-20 (cToken is itself an ERC20 receipt) — covered by the erc20 standard adapter via auto-enumerate, not a per-(chain,address) manifest

0xb2a02ff1.name: seize
0xb2a02ff1.reason: inter-cToken collateral seizure; callable only by a cToken contract during liquidation, not an EOA

0xa6afed95.name: accrueInterest
0xa6afed95.reason: permissionless interest accrual; moves no caller funds

0x17bfdfbc.name: borrowBalanceCurrent
0x17bfdfbc.reason: accrues interest then returns a value; informational, moves no caller funds and grants no permission

0x3af9e669.name: balanceOfUnderlying
0x3af9e669.reason: accrues interest then returns a value; informational, moves no caller funds and grants no permission

0x73acee98.name: totalBorrowsCurrent
0x73acee98.reason: accrues interest then returns a value; informational, moves no caller funds and grants no permission

0xbd6d894d.name: exchangeRateCurrent
0xbd6d894d.reason: accrues interest then returns a value; informational, moves no caller funds and grants no permission

0x1249c58b.name: mint
0x1249c58b.reason: user position: supply ETH via msg.value, mint cETH (Lending::Supply; payable, 0-arg overload)

0x4e4d9fea.name: repayBorrow
0x4e4d9fea.reason: user position: repay own cETH debt via msg.value (Lending::Repay; payable overload)

0xe5974619.name: repayBorrowBehalf
0xe5974619.reason: user fund move: repay another borrower's cETH debt via msg.value (Lending::Repay on-behalf; payable overload)

0xaae40a2a.name: liquidateBorrow
0xaae40a2a.reason: liquidation: repay cETH borrower via msg.value + seize collateral (Lending::Liquidate; payable overload)
